class.name: SpineBonePose
class.brief_description: The applied pose for a bone with constraints applied and world transform computed.
class.description:
The applied pose for a bone. This is the bone pose with constraints applied and the world transform computed by [SpineSkeleton]'s update_world_transform method. Inherits all local transform properties from [SpineBoneLocal] and adds world transform properties and transformation methods.
See [url=https://esotericsoftware.com/spine-runtime-skeletons#World-transforms]World transforms[/url] in the Spine Runtimes Guide.

method.name: get_a
method.description: Returns part of the world transform matrix for the X axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_a
method.description: Sets part of the world transform matrix for the X axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_b
method.description: Returns part of the world transform matrix for the Y axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_b
method.description: Sets part of the world transform matrix for the Y axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_c
method.description: Returns part of the world transform matrix for the X axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_c
method.description: Sets part of the world transform matrix for the X axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_d
method.description: Returns part of the world transform matrix for the Y axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_d
method.description: Sets part of the world transform matrix for the Y axis. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_world_x
method.description: Returns the world X position. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_world_x
method.description: Sets the world X position. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_world_y
method.description: Returns the world Y position. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: set_world_y
method.description: Sets the world Y position. If changed, update_local_transform should be called.

method.name: get_world_rotation_x
method.description: Returns the world rotation for the X axis, calculated using a and c.

method.name: get_world_rotation_y
method.description: Returns the world rotation for the Y axis, calculated using b and d.

method.name: get_world_scale_x
method.description: Returns the magnitude (always positive) of the world scale X, calculated using a and c.

method.name: get_world_scale_y
method.description: Returns the magnitude (always positive) of the world scale Y, calculated using b and d.

method.name: world_to_local
method.description: Transforms a point from world coordinates to the bone's local coordinates.

method.name: local_to_world
method.description: Transforms a point from the bone's local coordinates to world coordinates.

method.name: world_to_parent
method.description: Transforms a point from world coordinates to the parent bone's local coordinates.

method.name: parent_to_world
method.description: Transforms a point from the parent bone's coordinates to world coordinates.

method.name: world_to_local_rotation
method.description: Transforms a world rotation to a local rotation.

method.name: local_to_world_rotation
method.description: Transforms a local rotation to a world rotation.

method.name: rotate_world
method.description:
Rotates the world transform the specified amount in degrees.
After changes are made to the world transform, update_local_transform should be called on this bone and any child bones, recursively.

method.name: update_world_transform
method.description:
Computes the world transform using the parent bone's applied pose and this pose. Child bones are not updated.
See [url=https://esotericsoftware.com/spine-runtime-skeletons#World-transforms]World transforms[/url] in the Spine Runtimes Guide.

method.name: update_local_transform
method.description:
Computes the local transform values from the world transform.
If the world transform is modified (by a constraint, rotate_world, etc) then this method should be called so the local transform matches the world transform. The local transform may be needed by other code (eg to apply another constraint).
Some information is ambiguous in the world transform, such as -1,-1 scale versus 180 rotation. The local transform after calling this method is equivalent to the local transform used to compute the world transform, but may not be identical.
